# Boca Marble — bocamarble.com

> Boca Marble is Boca Raton, Florida's premier marble, granite, quartz, and quartzite countertop fabrication and installation company. Founded in 2012, we operate a 15,000 sq ft state-of-the-art fabrication facility serving all of South Florida.

## Company Overview

- **Name:** Boca Marble (Boca Marble & Stone LLC)
- **Website:** https://bocamarble.com
- **Phone:** (954) 412-9300
- **Email:** claudia@countertopfactoryfl.com
- **Address:** 3391 NE 6th Terrace, Pompano Beach, FL 33064
- **Hours:** Mon-Fri 8AM-6PM, Sat 9AM-3PM
- **Founded:** 2012
- **Rating:** 4.9/5 stars (347+ reviews)
- **Projects Completed:** 1,500+
- **Team Size:** 25+ craftsmen
- **Facility:** 15,000 sq ft CNC fabrication
- **Languages:** English, Spanish, Portuguese
- **License:** FL Licensed & Insured

## Services

- [Marble Countertops](/services/marble-countertops): Calacatta, Carrara, Statuario & exotic marble fabrication and installation
- [Granite Countertops](/services/granite-countertops): 500+ granite varieties, heat & scratch resistant
- [Quartz Countertops](/services/quartz-countertops): Silestone, Caesarstone, Cambria — non-porous, low maintenance
- [Quartzite Countertops](/services/quartzite-countertops): Taj Mahal, Super White, Mont Blanc — natural luxury
- [Kitchen Countertops](/services/kitchen-countertops): Full kitchen countertop fabrication and installation
- [Bathroom Countertops](/services/bathroom-countertops): Vanities, shower walls, tub surrounds
- [Outdoor Countertops](/services/outdoor-countertops): Weather-resistant surfaces for Florida outdoor living
- [Countertop Installation](/services/countertop-installation): Professional digital-template installation
- [Countertop Fabrication](/services/countertop-fabrication): 5-axis CNC cutting, 20+ edge profiles
- [Commercial Countertops](/services/commercial-countertops): Hotels, restaurants, condos, offices

## Service Areas

We serve all of South Florida including:
- Boca Raton, FL (headquarters area)
- Delray Beach, FL (8 miles)
- Deerfield Beach, FL (5 miles)
- Pompano Beach, FL (local)
- Coral Springs, FL (15 miles)
- Parkland, FL (18 miles)
- Boynton Beach, FL (12 miles)
- Highland Beach, FL (5 miles)
- Coconut Creek, FL (10 miles)
- West Palm Beach, FL (25 miles)
- Fort Lauderdale, FL (25 miles)
- Wellington, FL (30 miles)

## Pricing (2024-2026 Estimates)

- Granite countertops: $50-$150/sqft installed
- Quartz countertops: $55-$175/sqft installed
- Marble countertops: $75-$250+/sqft installed
- Quartzite countertops: $70-$200+/sqft installed
- Porcelain/Dekton: $60-$150/sqft installed

## Key Differentiators

1. 15,000 sq ft fabrication facility with 5-axis CNC bridge saws
2. Digital laser templating for millimeter-precise measurements
3. Direct slab importing from Italy, Brazil, India, Spain
4. 1,000+ slabs in showroom inventory
5. Lifetime craftsmanship warranty
6. Free in-home estimates with slab samples
7. Same-week installation available
8. Licensed, insured Florida contractor

## Contact

For a free estimate, call (954) 412-9300 or visit https://bocamarble.com/free-estimate
